tests_added: T-086-01: ribbon count is reduced — sourceCount ≤ 30 for default maxPoints
T-086-02: trail length is ≥ 80 points per ribbon (long sweeping curves)
T-086-03: aTrailProgress attribute exists with itemSize 1 and values in [0, 1]
T-086-04: vertex shader contains treble-driven point size modulation (uTrebleEnergy near gl_PointSize)
T-086-05: fragment shader contains trail-progress fade (vTrailProgress)
T-086-06: aTrailProgress attribute is registered in shaderRegistry as optional
T-086-07: advection produces spatially spread curves (not tightly clustered)
T-086-08: uFogFar default is widened to accommodate longer sweeping ribbons
T-086-09: bass modulates curve amplitude via scaled displacement factor
T-086-10: draw does not throw at extreme audio boundary values with new geometry
T-086-11: all buffer attributes remain finite with new trail geometry
